scenes.title: Bedtime Story
scenes.background_prompt: A child's bedroom at night with a bed, a nightstand with a lamp on, glow-in-the-dark stars on the ceiling, a bookshelf, and a stuffed animal. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A child's bedroom at bedtime with soft warm light from a nightstand lamp. A mother in a comfortable gray sweater sits propped up against pillows on a single bed with a blue duvet. A boy of about six in dinosaur pajamas is snuggled against her side, eyes wide and attentive, clutching a stuffed bear. The mother holds open a large illustrated storybook between them, one finger pointing at a line of text on the page. The visible text reads: 'The rabbit runned as fast as he could.' The boy looks at the word with a slight frown, as if something sounds wrong. Glow-in-the-dark stars are stuck to the ceiling above. A small bookshelf holds a row of children's books. The room is cozy and dim except for the warm circle of lamplight.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place mother propped up against pillows on the bed, sitting and holding open a large illustrated storybook. Place boy snuggled against her side, eyes wide, clutching a stuffed bear.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left, a small brown wooden nightstand with a single drawer and a round knob rests on a brown wooden plank floor. On top of the nightstand, a small brown teddy bear sits to the left of a glowing lamp with a yellow conical shade and a round brown base. Behind the nightstand is a wooden bed with a curved headboard and footboard. A yellow pillow is propped against the headboard. On the bed, a mother with wavy brown hair, wearing a green sweater with a yellow patterned collar, sits next to a boy. The boy has curly brown hair and wears a light blue shirt; he sits in front of the mother, holding a small brown teddy bear in his arms. The mother holds an open book with illustrated pages, and both characters are looking down at it. The bed is covered with a tan blanket and a blue top blanket featuring wavy light blue stripes. To the right of the bed stands a large brown wooden bookshelf with three shelves filled with various colorful books in shades of blue, red, green, yellow, pink, and purple, some standing upright and others lying flat. In the background on the right wall, a window with a brown frame shows a dark blue night sky with clouds and a sliver of a white moon. The room has blue walls and a sloped ceiling. The ceiling is decorated with numerous glowing yellow and green stars and two yellow crescent moons. The entire scene is illuminated by the warm light of the bedside lamp.

S: Window showing a dark night sky
IE: Mother opens a storybook to read
P: Mother wants to finish the story
Boy wants to listen to the tale
A: Mother is holding the open book
Boy is hugging his teddy bear
Characters are looking at the pages
CO: The boy will fall asleep soon
The room is filled with warm light

ENP: Glowing lamp with a yellow shade
